technologies.name: SKILLGEN

technologies.name: MUSE-Autoskill
technologies.description: Skill五阶段生命周期框架，Skill级记忆(.memory.md)累积经验，SkillsBench 68.40% SOTA，自生成Skill达87.94%

technologies.name: RESKILL
technologies.description: 将技能生成嵌入GRPO强化学习训练循环，零额外采样开销实现技能自生成、自评测、自进化

technologies.name: OPTSKILLS
technologies.description: 按问题原型组织经验，DBSCAN聚类+并行探索蒸馏构建技能库，NLCO数据集OOD泛化提升10个百分点

technologies.name: MIND-Skill
technologies.description: 首个技能生成闭环质量保证框架，归纳-演绎双智能体+三重文本损失联合优化，将技能质量从主观判断变为可测量可优化的过程

technologies.name: SkillRouter
technologies.description: 破解大规模Skills选择难题的新范式

technologies.name: SkillOrchestra

technologies.description: 创建、评估与连接AI技能，已收录60万+技能

technologies.name: SSL

technologies.name: GOSKILLS
technologies.description: 大规模Skill库的高效检索框架

technologies.name: SKILLGRAPH

technologies.name: SkillRAE
technologies.description: Skill检索与执行的统一框架

technologies.name: SkillsVote
technologies.description: 终极技能网关，recommend→feedback双接口闭环+LLM画像，168万+Skills

technologies.name: Skill-RAG (SRA)
technologies.description: 清华SRA范式，RAG检索知识→SRA检索可执行技能，SRA-Bench首个技能检索增强基准

technologies.name: SkillDAG
technologies.description: 五类有向边建模技能关系图，Agent执行中可查图、展开邻居、发现新关系并写回图里，检索从语义匹配升级为结构感知图推理

technologies.name: SKILLPYRAMID
technologies.description: 向下原子提取+向上抽象归纳，将平铺技能库重构为可组合、可演化的层级金字塔

technologies.name: Skill1
technologies.description: 将技能选择、利用、蒸馏三阶段并入同一RL策略，仅用任务结果信号驱动协同进化，低频趋势+高频变化拆解单一奖励

technologies.name: Skill-as-Pseudocode
technologies.description: 将技能文档从自然语言散文自动转换为带类型伪代码合约+具体动作模板，四重确定性校验剪断散文到动作的死循环

technologies.name: SkillsInjector
technologies.description: 用训练好的打分器替代语义匹配做技能选择，自适应预算替代固定Top-K，Set-Aware Renderer重写多技能描述以区分边界

technologies.name: 渐进式披露
technologies.description: Anthropic模块化AI能力扩展系统，文件夹结构封装知识，渐进式披露实现按需加载，将通用Claude转化为专业智体

technologies.name: SkVM
technologies.description: 给Skills做个编译器，一次编写，到处运行

technologies.name: 执行流图

technologies.name: File-as-State
technologies.description: 基于文件系统的轻量级Agent自动化方案，用文件状态替代重型框架

technologies.name: SkillSmith
technologies.description: 将编译原理引入技能管理，技能编译成带边界合约的运行时接口，Token减少57%、解决时间缩短50%

technologies.name: Skill-insight
technologies.description: 多维评测、执行追溯、归因分析

technologies.name: Cross-Evaluation

technologies.name: agent-skills-eval
technologies.description: Agent技能测试运行器，A/B对比+LLM自动裁判量化技能增益，生成可视化HTML报告

technologies.name: SKILLFLOW

technologies.name: SkillSafetyBench

technologies.name: SkillGenBench

technologies.name: SkillEvolBench
technologies.description: 系统化评测Agent能否将执行经验变成可复用程序知识，180任务6环境10模型3平台

technologies.name: Skill-insight Optimizer
technologies.description: 基于执行过程数据驱动的Skill自优化工具，动静态结合自动定位修补缺陷，支持交互式确认与版本回溯

technologies.name: SkillForge
technologies.description: 让企业级Agent Skills实现自主进化

technologies.name: Iterative Optimizer

technologies.name: SkillReducer
technologies.description: 为Skills瘦身40%，破解Token低效难题

technologies.description: 根据模型能力动态调整Skill策略

technologies.name: 双层MCTS
technologies.description: 双层蒙特卡洛树搜索实现Skill自进化

technologies.name: SkillClaw
technologies.description: Skill自动优化与学习框架

technologies.name: EmbodiSkill

technologies.name: AutoSkill
technologies.description: 双循环耦合架构实现技能增强响应生成与技能进化，SKILL.md 版本化自治，编程技能历经 34 轮迭代

technologies.name: SkillOpt
technologies.description: 将 Skill 文档视为可训练权重，深度学习训练循环自动优化 Skill，52 组合全最优，平均 +23.5 分

technologies.name: Darwin-Skill

technologies.name: SkillMAS

technologies.name: SkillGrad
technologies.description: 将梯度下降四核心概念用文本机制逐一模拟，让技能优化有方向有记忆有信号分解，平均超最强训练基线6.7个百分点

technologies.name: SKILLC
technologies.description: 将技能内化升级为信用分配问题，CSCA让Agent知道不带技能也能成功比靠技能成功更值得学，ALFWorld超SKILL0 5.5个百分点

technologies.name: HiSME
